name: requests库-GET
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import requests; r=requests.get("http://httpbin.org/get"); print(r.status_code)'

name: requests库-POST

name: pathlib路径
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'from pathlib import Path; p=Path("/workspace"); print(p.name)'

name: 多行函数定义
command:
/nsjail python3 -c 'def fib(n):
    if n <= 1: return n
    return fib(n-1) + fib(n-2)
print(fib(10))'

name: 类定义和使用
command:
/nsjail python3 -c 'class Point:
    def __init__(self, x, y):
        self.x = x
        self.y = y
    def distance(self):
        return (self.x**2 + self.y**2)**0.5
p = Point(3, 4)
print(int(p.distance()))'

name: 异常处理
command:
/nsjail python3 -c 'try:
    x = 1 / 0
except ZeroDivisionError:
    print("caught")'

name: 上下文管理器
command:
/nsjail python3 -c 'with open("/workspace/test.txt", "w") as f:
    f.write("hello")
with open("/workspace/test.txt") as f:
    print(f.read())'

name: httpx同步请求
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import httpx; r=httpx.get("http://httpbin.org/get"); print(r.status_code)'

name: httpx异步请求
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import asyncio, httpx; async def f(): async with httpx.AsyncClient() as c: r=await c.get("http://httpbin.org/get"); return r.status_code; print(asyncio.run(f()))'

name: pydantic模型验证
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'from pydantic import BaseModel; class User(BaseModel): name: str; age: int; u=User(name="test", age=25); print(u.age)'

name: pydantic类型错误
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'from pydantic import BaseModel, ValidationError; class User(BaseModel): age: int; try: User(age="abc"); except ValidationError: print("error")'

name: aiohttp客户端
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import asyncio, aiohttp; async def f(): async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as s: async with s.get("http://httpbin.org/get") as r: return r.status; print(asyncio.run(f()))'

name: fastapi路由定义
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'from fastapi import FastAPI; app=FastAPI(); @app.get("/"); def read_root(): return {"Hello": "World"}; print(read_root())'

name: typer CLI
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import typer; app=typer.Typer(); @app.command(); def hello(name: str = "World"): print(f"Hello {name}"); hello()'

name: rich格式化

command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import subprocess; r=subprocess.run(["echo","test"], capture_output=True, text=True); print(r.stdout.strip())'

command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import os; os.makedirs("/workspace/test", exist_ok=True); print(os.path.exists("/workspace/test"))'

name: shutil文件复制
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import shutil; open("/workspace/a.txt","w").write("test"); shutil.copy("/workspace/a.txt","/workspace/b.txt"); print(open("/workspace/b.txt").read())'

name: glob文件匹配
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import glob; open("/workspace/test.txt","w"); print(len(glob.glob("/workspace/*.txt")))'

name: tempfile临时文件
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import tempfile; with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",delete=False) as f: f.write("test"); print("ok")'

name: hashlib MD5
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import hashlib; print(hashlib.md5(b"test").hexdigest())'

command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import base64; encoded=base64.b64encode(b"test"); print(base64.b64decode(encoded).decode())'

name: sqlite3数据库
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import sqlite3; conn=sqlite3.connect(":memory:"); c=conn.cursor(); c.execute("CREATE TABLE t(id INT)"); c.execute("INSERT INTO t VALUES(1)"); print(c.execute("SELECT * FROM t").fetchone()[0])'

name: csv文件读写
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import csv; with open("/workspace/t.csv","w",newline="") as f: csv.writer(f).writerow(["a","b"]); with open("/workspace/t.csv") as f: print(csv.reader(f).__next__()[0])'
